title: The Plan to Strike Big Mom
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Judge, Reiju, Jinbe, Pudding, Sanji, Big Mom as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: GERMA kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Today is finally

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: The day that Lord Sanji gets married!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Apparently the escort regiment we sent wasn't able to get inside the castle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: which means that we're not going to be able to attend, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do they even need bodyguards at a Wed- Ding?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What a peaceful day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Whole Cake Chateau

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: All ye of the Vinsmoke family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Knock Knock

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Good morning!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yonji! Wake your up and change!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Where's Reju? She isn't in her room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Oh, by the way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She already finished getting ready in another room!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's still over an hour! Please, do not rush yourselves!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: ninth floor big mom's bedroom

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: GyayayaAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WAA- WHA- whatever is the matter, Mama?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: shall I call the miniis-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: H- He won't move!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He's dead! My cute little skeleton is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That's certainly a shame, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Today's the day of the tea party, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Wedding CAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAKE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Haaaaa- Hahaha! Mamama! :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The other guests are arriving at the castle, one after another!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Morgannes appears to have just arrived at the port.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: What's the matter, pudding?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Your dress looks wonderful on you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Pudding's room

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't bear the thought of blood staining this

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: After I kill that Sanji Idiot, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I feel down...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: MMM...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What's the matter? Marriage blues?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Gyaha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel like I'm shouldering too heavy a burden, nitro and Rabian.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: MMM...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In order for me to return to life as a good girl, I'm going to have to

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: overwrite a bunch of people's memories and stuff. Honestly, with all of these things, I can't help but think...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What a bloody pain in the ass.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Very soon, the party begins! The "tea party from hell"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: terror! And the sighs of a bride!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 44 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
